✨ Chai lovers, your dream sampler is here!

With 10 regional chai flavors and 100% pure ingredients, discover chai like never before—fresh and authentic.

🎁 Grab your free double-walled glass tea cup + spoon, And free shipping today!

☕ Uncover India’s rich chai legacy with  each blend of Teabox’s Variety Pack!
